title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Walmart India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Walmart India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Walmart India in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India:
Walmart India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India!
